entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS244) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD ONE (1) NEW BAYTECH SED UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1189.01E. 2. TO ADD SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS SERVICE CLIN 760601 AND CLIN 760602 SWC PRICES AND PRICE REDUCTION FOR EXISTING SWC FOR BOTH CLIN 760601 AND CLIN 760602 UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1191.01S. 3. TO ADD TWO (2) NEW CHARLES INDUSTRIES AND TWO (2) CISCO SEDS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1195.01E. 4. TO ADD ONE (1) NEW CISCO SED UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1196.01E. 5. TO ADD RIVERBED TECHNOLOGY SEDS AND CISCO SED UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1198.01E. 6. TO ADD TWENTY-FIVE (25) NEW NETAPP SEDS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1199.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS247) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD ACCESS SHARED ETHERNET, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1182.01E. 2. TO ADD SED MMRC TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1213.01E. 3. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1219.01E. 4. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC. 5. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS248) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET CLINS AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU2143.01S. 2. ADDITION OF OC3 ACCESS CLINS AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU2144.01E. 3. ADDITION OF SED MANUFACTURER NAME UPDATE AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU2169.01. 4. ADDITION OF CUSTOM ACCESS ARRANGEMENT ICB CASE NUMBERS AND CLINS, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SUBMITTAL AU2187.01E 5. ADDITION OF NETSCOUT WIRELINE SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2173.01E 6. ADDITION OF RIVERBED SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU2186.01E 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 8. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS249) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD IPS DOMESTIC PORT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1201.01E. 2. TO ADD IPS FEATURE PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1204.01E. 3. TO ADD MPLS PORT AS A PART OF THE NBIP-VPNS FEATURE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1210.01E. 4. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1218.01E. 5. TO ADD THREE NEW JUNIPER WIRELINE SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1227.01E. 6. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC. 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS250) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD REDUNDANT FIREWALL TO THE MTIPS SERVICE UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1205.01E. 2. TO ADD ICB PRICING FOR 2 X OC3C (155 MBPS) ACCESS CIRCUITS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1207.01E. 3. TO ADD SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS SERVICE CLIN 760619 AND CLIN 760620 SWC PRICES UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1209.01E. 4. TO ADD TWO (2) NEW NET SCOUT SEDS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1220.01E. 5. TO ADD THREE (3) NEW PALO ALTO NETWORKS SEDS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1224.01E. 6. TO ADD ONE (1) NEW RIVERBED TECHNOLOGY SED UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1231.01E. 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 8. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADDITION OF WIRELINE SEDS AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1232.01E. 2. ADDITION OF WIRELINE SEDS AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1234.01E. 3. ADDITION OF PREMISE WIRING CLIN(S) AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1221.01E. 4. ADDITION OF PREMISE WIRING CLIN(S) AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1222.01E. 5. ADDITION OF MNS MES CLIN CORRECTIONS AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1229.01E. 6. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC. 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
